name: Nachkriegsratten Punk-Rock Puzzle
short_description: Nachkriegsratten (Post-war rats), probably the first punk band to combine life-negating noise with turtle-like deceleration in a puzzle game. 24 mouth-painted pictures in 6 different sizes. are you brave enough? Have you ever danced with the Lumberjack Bear in the pale moonlight? HIA HUA!
detailed_description:
FEATURES


  • 24 punky jigsaw puzzles to solve
  • in 6 sizes each, makes 144 PUZZLES!
  • 77 unlockable achievements
  • go crazy with the puzzle piece rotation
  • 6 atmospheric mouse cursors
  • 1 unatmospheric mouse cursor
  • The new Nachkriegsratten album “Hia Hua” in permanent rotation to punk around
  • PUNK ROCK UNTIL THE DOCTOR COMES!
  • HIA HUA! SHUT UP I WANT TO PUZZLE!

Tracks and Puzzle scenes:
